sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104873" key="trigo/las" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τριγόλας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n104873.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρίγλη</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">66</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
